@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent filtered by the package license in package_database.packageinfo (call_eJlz4VYzf6heD9o9PrvGcslC) and never applied the required project-level MIT license filter from project_database.project_info, so its join set was wrong and led to a different top 5 (e.g., missing moment/moment).
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
In the execute_python step, the agent parsed fork counts from project_info using the overly specific regex "([0-9][0-9,]*) forks", which misses variants like "forks count of N" shown in the query_db preview, causing valid high-fork projects (e.g., moment/moment) to be dropped and yielding an incorrect top-5.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
In execute_python, the agent used a fragile regex that only matches fork counts appearing before the word "forks" (pattern "... ([0-9,]+) forks"), so many Project_Information entries phrased like "forks count of N" (visible in the query_db preview) were not parsed—causing high-fork projects such as moment/moment to be omitted and tailwindcss/tailwindcss to appear instead.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent had the right approach (filter release NPM versions, map to GitHub projects, parse forks) but failed to implement the mapping step by insisting on a single large IN clause (calls var_call_3NoJ1yXfB9sgGUhE3gA8TFc3 and var_call_cPAJzYHX3zERKJfWJnLis3pS) and then aborting despite only 1,016 items (var_call_DO3d57s3kVafP7tDSSZkjzHb), returning an "Unable to compute" message instead of chunking queries to complete the join.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent joined the correct tables but its execute_python step extracted fork counts using a regex that only matches the pattern "N forks," missing entries phrased as "a forks count of N" (e.g., moment/moment), which led to omitting high-fork projects and returning tailwindcss instead.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
